allow: PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; 8001..8005 | ForEach-Object { $port = $_; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:$port/health" -TimeoutSec 5 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "Worker $port`: OK" } catch { Write-Host "Worker $port`: FAIL" } })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; 8001..8005 | ForEach-Object { $port = $_; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:$port/health" -TimeoutSec 5 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "Worker $port`: OK" } catch { Write-Host "Worker $port`: FAIL - $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:5173" -TimeoutSec 5 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "Frontend: OK \($\($r.StatusCode\)\)" } catch { Write-Host "Frontend: FAIL - $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
PowerShell(Start-Process -FilePath "cmd.exe" -ArgumentList "/c cd C:\\graph_knowledge\\apps\\web && npm run dev" -NoNewWindow)

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:5173" -TimeoutSec 5 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "Frontend: OK \($\($r.StatusCode\)\)" } catch { Write-Host "Frontend: FAIL - $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
